data.title: Sui validators freeze majority of stolen funds in $220M Cetus hack
data.description:
Cetus, a decentralized crypto exchange (DEX) built atop the Sui blockchain network, said $162 million of over $220 million stolen in a May 22 hack has been frozen. According to the Cetus team, the DEX is working with the Sui Foundation and other entities within the ecosystem to recover the remainder of the funds. The Sui Foundation also confirmed:"A large number of validators identified the addresses with the stolen funds and are ignoring transactions on those addresses until further notice. The Cetus team is exploring paths to recover those funds and return them to the community
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sui-validators-freeze-majority-stolen-funds-220m-cetus-hack?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act Returns to Exempt Wallets, Miners From Money-Transmitter Rules
data.description:
Congressmen Tom Emmer and Ritchie Torres have reintroduced the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act, arguing that non-custodial crypto services—wallet developers, miners and validators—should not be labelled money transmitters, a stance backers believe will discourage firms from leaving the U. S.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/blockchain-regulatory-certainty-act-wallets-miners-exempt/

data.title: UK Judges Slam $11.9B Bitcoin SV Lawsuit – Proof of Losses Now Required
data.description:
UK judges have redrawn the Bitcoin SV Lawsuit, ruling damages must reflect market prices shortly after the 2019 exchange delistings. Claims tied to hypothetical future highs are struck out, leaving only early sellers and locked-out users to seek compensation for verifiable losses. The post UK Judges Slam $11.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uk-judges-gut-11b-bitcoin-sv-lawsuit-proof-required/

data.title: Solana price fractal targets rally to $260, but one thing must happen first — Analysts
data.description:
Key takeaways:Solana’s bull flag pattern projects a rally to $260, but low spot buy volumes have analysts advising caution. After briefly dropping to $160 from $184, Solana (SOL) is attempting to reclaim a position above its key resistance at $180 for a second consecutive week. With Bitcoin (BTC) hitting an all-time high, market speculators are banking on eventual capital rotation, which could pump major altcoins like SOL toward new highs. Solana shows promising signs on the daily chart, forming a textbook bull flag pattern after a strong uptrend
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-price-fractal-targets-rally-to-260-but-one-thing-must-happen-first-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OpenAI plans to ship 100 million pocket-sized AI devices for everyday use
data.description:
OpenAI is planning to develop AI “companion” devices that will integrate artificial intelligence capabilities with everyday life, potentially opening the door to a new high-tech innovation used alongside laptops and smartphones. In an interview with The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he and designer Jony Ive are developing these secret devices for mass consumption, with plans to ship 100 million units upon launch. Ives joined OpenAI after his startup, io, was acquired by Altman’s company in a $6. 5 billion deal, the Journal reported on May 21
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/openai-100-million-pocket-sized-ai-devices-everyday-use?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ECB Warns of Major Downside Risk As Stock Market Goes ‘Out of Sync’ With Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) is warning that the past month’s stock market recovery is at risk amid ongoing geopolitical uncertainty. In a forward to the bank’s biannual “Financial Stability Review,” ECB Vice President Luis de Guindos says markets are still “highly sensitive” to news about global trade arrangements.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/22/ecb-warns-of-major-downside-risk-as-stock-market-goes-out-of-sync-with-geopolitical-uncertainty/

data.title: OpenAI Plans AI Companion Devices and Social Media Expansion
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, OpenAI is set to revolutionize the tech landscape with the development of AI 'companion' devices designed to seamlessly integrate artificial intelligence into daily life. These devices, envisioned by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and renowned designer Jony Ive, aim to complement existing technologies like laptops and smartphones. The ambitious project plans to launch with an initial shipment of 100 million units, signaling a significant leap in AI consumer technology.

Jony Ive, who joined OpenAI following the acquisition of his startup io for $6.5 billion, described these devices as part of a 'new design movement.' While specific details about the devices' appearance and functionality remain undisclosed, Ive hinted at a design philosophy reminiscent of Apple's cohesive hardware and software ecosystem. OpenAI's venture into hardware is backed by substantial investor confidence, fueled by the success of its ChatGPT large language model, which boasts nearly 800 million weekly active users as of May 2025. This success has propelled OpenAI's valuation from $157 billion in October 2024 to an impressive $300 billion by March 2025.

Beyond hardware, OpenAI is also setting its sights on the social media landscape, with plans to challenge platforms like Elon Musk's X and Mark Zuckerberg's Meta. As reported by The Verge, OpenAI's new social media platform will integrate ChatGPT's image generation capabilities with a feed structure similar to X's. It remains uncertain whether this platform will be a standalone product or an extension of ChatGPT. This initiative reflects a broader trend of blending AI with social media, a movement that has also influenced the blockchain sector. Startups are increasingly leveraging AI and blockchain technologies to create AI agents, large language model tools, and decentralized social media networks.

In a related development, Validation Cloud has implemented a large language model on the Hedera network, enhancing decentralized finance users' ability to query blockchain data. This integration exemplifies the growing intersection of AI and blockchain, highlighting the potential for innovative applications across various industries. OpenAI's endeavors in both hardware and social media underscore its commitment to expanding the reach and impact of artificial intelligence, positioning the company as a key player in the evolving tech ecosystem.
